name: Cauliflower Casserole Deluxe
recipeIngredient: 4 Ounces reduced-fat sharp cheddar cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam fresh cauliflower florets for 5-7 minutes or frozen florets according to package instructions until crisp tender; drain.
2. Coat a saucepan with cooking spray. Saute green onions, celery, and bell peppers in the saucepan until limp. Add seasonings. Blend in flour and cook for 1 minute.
3. Gradually add milk, stirring constantly. Simmer until the mixture thickens. Remove from heat.
4. Stir in cheese until melted.
5. In a 2-quart baking dish, layer half the cauliflower, sliced tomatoes, and water chestnuts. Pour over half the sauce.
6. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients, ending with sauce. Sprinkle with bread crumbs and mint leaves (optional).
7. Bake at 350° F for 25-30 minutes until bubbly and top is a light golden brown.
